  About Me
  Hi! I'm Shivang — a Business Analytics graduate student at UC San Diego's Rady School of Management. I specialize in business intelligence, revenue analytics, and building data-driven solutions for enterprise clients.
  When I'm not crunching numbers, you'll find me watching soccer, chasing sunsets, or debating who's winning the next World Cup.

      GTM-focused analytics professional with 4+ years turning pipeline data, marketing signals, and customer behavior into revenue growth. Experienced in building forecasting models, attribution frameworks, and self-serve dashboards that empower marketing, sales, and product teams to move faster. Pursuing an M.S. in Business Analytics at UC San Diego (Rady).

    💼 Experience

    
      Senior Business Intelligence Analyst (GTM & Revenue) — NuSummit Technologies
      Apr 2023 – Apr 2025 · Remote
      Led GTM & revenue dashboard automation for enterprise clients in financial services and insurance. Built SQL/Snowflake pipeline forecasting models from Salesforce data to track lead-to-close efficiency. Partnered with marketing and sales to define GTM KPIs, boosting campaign ROI by 20% and conversion rates by 12%. Developed ETL pipelines and Python scripts in AWS for near real-time executive reporting. Created customer segmentation models achieving 94% accuracy across 5,000+ reviews to guide product launches.
    

    
      Business Intelligence Analyst (GTM Reporting) — Boston Institute of Analytics
      Jun 2021 – Jan 2023 · Remote
      Built dashboards tracking pipeline health, marketing impact, and customer success. Developed a Multi-Touch Attribution framework to determine ROAS and optimize channel spend. Conducted funnel analysis and A/B testing in HubSpot and Salesforce. Optimized SQL queries reducing dashboard latency by 70%. Supported Qlik-to-Tableau migration through standardized metrics and self-serve analytics.
    

    
      Data Strategy Intern (Sales Analytics) — Kustard.ai
      Apr – Jul 2019 · Remote
      Designed pipeline and lead efficiency dashboards. Built predictive engagement models improving targeting accuracy to 94%. Automated sales reporting cutting turnaround time by 30%. Supported GTM planning to boost consumer engagement by 7%.

title: Projects
text:
GTM analytics, customer targeting, uplift modeling & growth experimentation
  




  🎯 Targeting & Growth

  
    Up-Sell Ad Campaign for Intuit QuickBooks
    UCSD · Customer Analytics · Dec 2025
    Built an ML model on clickstream data of 1M users to identify causal relationships between product features and customer engagement. Used uplift modeling to inform a second-wave targeting campaign.
    
      $380K
      Profit generated from targeted second-wave campaign
    
    Uplift ModelingCausal InferencePythonClickstreamCampaign Optimization
  

  
    Predicting Churn & Design of Experiments
    UCSD · Customer Analytics
    Developed churn prediction models and designed experiments to test retention strategies. Applied A/B testing frameworks to measure the effectiveness of intervention tactics on at-risk customer segments.
    
      🔬
      Experimental design to validate retention strategies before full rollout
    
    Churn PredictionA/B TestingExperiment DesignPythonRetention
  

  
    Personalization for Pentathlon
    UCSD · Customer Analytics
    Built personalized recommendation and targeting models to optimize customer engagement across multiple touchpoints. Leveraged customer segmentation to tailor messaging and offers for different user cohorts.
    
      🎯
      Multi-channel personalization across customer lifecycle
    
    PersonalizationSegmentationRecommendation SystemsPython
  

  📊 Measurement & Attribution

  
    Measuring Uplift for Creative Gaming
    UCSD · Customer Analytics
    Applied uplift modeling techniques to measure the incremental impact of creative ad variations on player acquisition and engagement in a gaming context. Quantified which creative elements drove true lift vs. organic conversion.
    
      📈
      Isolated true creative impact from organic conversion
    
    Uplift ModelingIncrementalityCreative TestingPython
  

  
    Market Sentiment & Brand Perception Analysis
    UCSD · Jan 2026
    Analyzed Twitter and digital news sentiment to evaluate shifts in brand perception. Discovered that trend-driven brands experienced faster and stronger short-term sentiment changes compared to established brands — key insight for brand marketing teams.
    
      🔍
      Quantified sentiment velocity differences between brand archetypes
    
    NLPSentiment AnalysisBrand AnalyticsTwitter APIPython
